_comment: Cards the daily recorder tracks. Each entry needs an 'id' (the Pokemon TCG API card id, e.g. 'swsh12-186'). The optional 'label' is just for your own reference. Find a card's id by searching it in Route 7 and checking the id, or via api.pokemontcg.io. Add/remove freely — the next daily run picks up changes.

cards.label: Umbreon VMAX alt art (Moonbreon) — Evolving Skies
Lugia V alt art — Silver Tempest
Giratina V alt art — Lost Origin
Rayquaza VMAX alt art — Evolving Skies era
